_comment: Stryker mutation testing for the self-contained JS in scripts/. The Python lints use cosmic-ray (see cosmic-ray.toml); this is the JS counterpart. Slow, so wired as a scheduled/dispatch CI job, never a required check. The CLI-entry block in assemble-changelog.mjs carries `// Stryker disable` markers (its mutants are unkillable by in-process tests), so they are excluded from the score rather than reported as survivors.
_ignore_comment: Stryker copies the project into a sandbox; keep the Python venv, mutation artifacts, and worktrees out of it (the venv's symlinks crash the copy, and none are needed to run the JS test).
